title: Add Google site verification HTML file to website root

requirements.text: Serve the Google site verification file at the path /google0e657d46cb230404.html. The file must be accessible at the website root and contain exactly the content: 'google-site-verification: google0e657d46cb230404.html' so that Google Search Console can verify site ownership.

quotes: google-site-verification: google0e657d46cb230404.html upload this html file to the website

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /google0e657d46cb230404.html returns a valid HTML page
The page content satisfies Google Search Console's site verification check
The file is placed in the frontend/public directory so it is served as a static asset at the website root

constraints: The verification file must be served as a static file at the exact path /google0e657d46cb230404.html — do not alter its filename or path
Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Modifying backend logic or Motoko code
Changing the Google OAuth consent screen configuration
Adding any new UI components or pages beyond the static verification file
